secrets.description: Per-turn shot clock in seconds. When a player's countdown reaches zero, they forfeit the game.
How many seconds both players have to click Rematch after a game ends. If only one clicks within this window, no rematch occurs.
Maximum characters allowed per in-game chat message.
Seconds a waiting room sits idle (no players, no SSE connections) before being automatically abandoned.
Maximum number of rows returned by the leaderboard endpoint.
Seconds a player stays in the Quick Match queue before being automatically removed if no opponent is found.
